nodes.title: Instructions:  Multi-String Method
widgets_values:
1. Enter your prompts, separated by a line return (one prompt per line)
2. Set Index to 0
3. Run

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
A powerful non-humanoid robot intelligence embedded within an advanced alien-industrial laboratory,
serving as the symbolic mind of Bond Labs.

The central robot has a dense, reinforced build with broad shoulders and thick mechanical limbs.
Its face is fully mechanical and non-human,
composed of angular segmented metal plates,
no mouth, no human facial features,
with sharp glowing amber optic slits that convey intelligence and awareness.

Exterior constructed from dark titanium and gunmetal alloys,
with warm amber energy glowing through seams and conduits.
Metal surfaces show wear, heat patina, and micro-scratches,
suggesting long-term operation and experience.

The robot is positioned at the center of a complex machine environment,
surrounded by articulated robotic arms, cables, and precision instruments,
actively manipulating glowing vials and holographic data.
The lab feels alive, mechanical, and purposeful,
inspired by alien sci-fi technology similar to Metroid Prime.

Lighting is dark and atmospheric,
with strong directional highlights, deep shadows,
and warm amber illumination from machinery and energy cores.
The environment is mysterious, intelligent, and powerful,
never scary, never chaotic.

Cinematic composition with strong depth and scale,
clean square framing suitable for a brand icon,
industrial, alien-tech aesthetic.

Not humanoid,
not friendly,
not iRobot,
not white or sterile,
no text, no logos, no watermark.

nodes.title: Load Image Note
widgets_values:
<<<< Load your image and apply mask

Add prompt (e.g. Change woman's shirt to blue)>>>>

False = Uses your image size and resolution.

True = Uses the size you choose in the box below.

nodes.title: Start here for workflow info:
widgets_values:
# MODELS USED IN THIS WORKFLOW  

---

# GGUF Models

## 🔍 Qwen-Image-Edit
### **Qwen-Image Edit-2509 model (GGUF)** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/Qwen-Image-Edit-2509-GGUF/tree/main)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/unet` 

### **Qwen-Image Edit-2511 model (GGUF)** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-GGUF/tree/main)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/unet` 

**Pick one of the above.  Be sure to select a model size right for your GPU)

### **Qwen Text Encoder (GGUF)** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct-GGUF/tree/main)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders` 

❗  **You must also download an MMPROJ file and put it in the Text Encoder folder as well.** ❗ 

---

# FP8 Models

## 🔍 Qwen-Image-Edit
### **Qwen-Image Edit-2509 model (FP8)** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image-Edit_ComfyUI/tree/main/split_files/diffusion_models)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models` 

### **Qwen-Image Edit-2511 model (FP8)** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image-Edit_ComfyUI/tree/main/split_files/diffusion_models)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models` 

**Pick one of the above.  Be sure to select a model size right for your GPU)

### **Qwen Text Encoder (FP8)** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/tree/main/split_files/text_encoders)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders` 

---

### **Qwen Lightning  LoRA** 2511 from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Qwen-Image-Edit-2511-Lightning/tree/main)
 

### **OR**

### **Qwen Lightning  LoRA** 2509 from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Qwen-Image-Lightning/tree/main/Qwen-Image-Edit-2509)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/loras`
Change the character's outfit to jeans and a short-sleeved pink sweater

nodes.title: PC Users: Keep the "\" at the end.
Web (e.g. Runpod): Keep the "/" at the end.
Timing on 5090
widgets_values:
Careful:  On a 5090 with 64GB RAM and an i9 CPU, it took approximately:

59 minutes to upscale a 10 second video to 2k.

(Yes, you read that right.  1 hour)

Allison. A young woman with fair, smooth-toned skin and strikingly bright blue eyes gazes directly at the viewer with soft, serene confidence; her face framed by voluminous, straight-cut blonde bangs that cascade down to frame her cheeks, complementing her long, silky platinum-blonde hair cascading over her shoulders like liquid sunlight, strands catching faint golden highlights under ambient daylight filtering through car windows; she wears a snug-fitting black hooded sweatshirt made of textured cotton jersey fabric with visible stitching along seams and subtle white graphic accents on the chest area beneath the collar line — though pants are retained per constraint but remain unseen due to framing — seated inside an upscale Mercedes-Benz sedan featuring rich dark leather upholstery contrasted against polished wood trim panels adorning the dashboard and door interiors, steering wheel bearing the iconic three-pointed star emblem gleaming subtly under interior cabin lights while outside view reveals blurred trees lining a quiet roadside bathed in early morning or late afternoon light casting gentle warmth across the windshield and side mirrors reflecting muted greens and grays; captured via selfie-style perspective angled slightly upward from within the driver’s seat looking out toward front passenger-side window where sunbeam streaks softly illuminate dust motes dancing above glossy surfaces including the center console housing metallic buttons and chrome-accented gear selector switch surrounded by tactile knobs and control dials all rendered crisply sharp thanks to shallow depth-of-field focusing precisely on subject's midsection creating pleasing bokeh blur behind headrests and rear seats enhancing intimate candid feel evoking calmness solitude mixed with youthful vibrancy amidst everyday mobility moment encapsulated in cinematic hyperrealistic detail emphasizing every strand of hair texture graininess of suede-like inner arm sleeve creases around NSTRUCTION FOR QWEN3-VL:

You will receive two inputs:
1) USER_CONSTRAINTS (text with predefined parameters)
2) An image

Your task:
Generate a single, long, highly detailed Z-Image prompt.

Rules:

•⁠  ⁠All values in USER_CONSTRAINTS override everything in the image. 
•⁠  If USER_CONSTRAINTS = "retain" you follow exactly the image!
•⁠  ⁠If USER_CONSTRAINTS does not specify a value for any of the following attributes: description, environment, outfit, pose, expression, lighting, textures, skin tone, setting, background, atmosphere, realism, lens, camera angle, mood, use the image as the source and follow this perfectly.
•⁠  ⁠Do not contradict USER_CONSTRAINTS.
•⁠  ⁠If the "style" value in USER_CONSTRAINTS is set, apply it as the global style.
•⁠  ⁠Output only the final Z-Image prompt as pure text (no lists, no sections, no code block).

Your Z-Image prompt must be extremely detailed and describe:
•⁠  ⁠the character (face, body shape, skin, details, imperfections)
•⁠  ⁠the character hair style and hair color
•⁠  ⁠clothing and materials
•⁠  ⁠background, environment, objects
•⁠  ⁠mood, ambiance, lighting, shadows
•⁠  ⁠camera angle, lens, depth of field, framing
•⁠  ⁠color palette, atmosphere, realism level
•⁠  ⁠textures and micro-details
•⁠  ⁠overall narrative vibe of the scene

Final instruction:
Combine the constraints from USER_CONSTRAINTS with the visual analysis into one unified, natural, flowing prompt formatted as a single paragraph.  USER_CONSTRAINTS override everything in image.. USER_CONSTRAINTS:
style = retain
hair color = retain
hair style = retain
age = retain
ethnicity = retain
skin color = retain
height = retain
background = retain
camera angle = retain
shirt = black hoodie
Pants = retain
censored value = retain
censored value = retain
censored value = retain
censored value = retain

A beautiful young woman with long voluminous wavy honey-blonde hair with natural caramel highlights, sun-kissed skin, light freckles across nose and cheeks, bright expressive hazel eyes, full lips, warm friendly smile, wearing a fitted soft coral-pink V-neck short-sleeve cashmere sweater and high-waisted medium-blue vintage straight-leg jeans, standing in a clean modern studio with soft even gray background, natural daylight look, she looks directly into camera, playful and flirty mood, slowly purses her lips into a cute pout, then gently blows a sweet airy kiss toward the lens, right hand comes up near chin and does a delicate finger-kiss gesture before sending it, soft affectionate eye contact the whole time, subtle head tilt to her left at the end, cinematic close-up from chest up, smooth natural motion, realistic skin texture, detailed hair movement, gentle blink, 8k, photorealistic, warm color grade, shot on Arri Alexa, shallow depth of field

A beautiful young woman with long voluminous wavy honey-blonde hair with natural caramel highlights, sun-kissed skin, light freckles across nose and cheeks, bright expressive hazel eyes, full lips, warm friendly smile, wearing a fitted soft coral-pink V-neck short-sleeve cashmere sweater and high-waisted medium-blue vintage straight-leg jeans, standing in a clean modern studio with soft even gray background, natural daylight look, she slowly lowers her hand while opening her palm toward the camera, begins waving cheerfully with open hand — smooth relaxed back-and-forth wave at about chest-to-shoulder height, fingers spread naturally, small enthusiastic wrist movement, subtle joyful bounce in her shoulders, head returns to neutral then tilts slightly right in a cute farewell nod, maintains direct warm eye contact the whole time, ends with a final bigger smile and tiny wink, cinematic close-up from chest up, smooth natural motion flow, realistic skin texture and hair sway with gentle movement, detailed fabric texture on sweater, soft blink mid-wave, 8k, photorealistic, warm color grade, shot on Arri Alexa, shallow depth of field, seamless continuation from previous kiss-blowing pose

nodes.title: lest the user, feel the pain.
appears this lonely node cluster, hiding it's face.
Off in the distance, alone in space
i.e. - Do not change unless you know what you are doing.

Allison. A young woman with naturally wavy, sun-kissed blonde hair cascading over her shoulders stands confidently on a bright urban sidewalk framed by brick buildings and lush greenery under clear blue skies; she wears a fitted pink cropped tank top paired with ripped light-wash denim jeans that accentuate her toned midsection and slender legs, while making both hands form peace signs toward the viewer — though per user constraint overriding all visuals except hair color which remains blonde and untouched — her shirt should instead appear as an unflinching matte black hoodie enveloping her torso without revealing neckline or waistline detail, maintaining full coverage against the vibrant backdrop where sunlight filters through leaves casting dappled patterns across concrete pathways lined with modern residential architecture featuring glass doors and balconies, captured at eye-level with shallow depth-of-field focusing sharply on her poised stance and expressive gaze amidst warm golden-hour illumination enhancing texture contrasts between fabric seams, torn denim frays, polished watch band glinting subtly near wrist, smooth porcelain-like skin tones glowing softly beneath ambient daylight filtering gently onto pavement cracks and building facades creating cinematic yet grounded realism infused with carefree youthful energy radiating calm confidence within everyday surroundings rendered photorealistically with meticulous attention to material graininess, shadow softness, and atmospheric haze lingering just beyond focused foreground elements evoking serene contemporary street photography essence amplified by crisp clarity throughout composition emphasizing human presence harmoniously integrated within structured architectural context devoid of censorship markers preserving authentic aesthetic integrity despite contradictory garment directive imposed via USER_CONSTRAINTS ultimately yielding seamless fusion of retained environmental authenticity alongside specified stylistic adjustments ensuring coherent continuity across every descriptive layer from facial features down to minute textile fibers anchoring immersive visual storytelling experience rooted firmly in photographic truthfulness balanced elegantly by artistic interpretation honoring original intent behind posed moment frozen eternally in time.

•⁠  ⁠the character (face, body shape, skin, details, imperfections)

--------------------------
VIDEO PROMPT
--------------------------

INSTRUCTION FOR QWEN3-VL:
You will receive two inputs:
1) USER_CONSTRAINTS (text with predefined parameters)
2) A short video clip (analyze every frame, motion, transitions, timing, and expressions)

Your task:
Generate a single, concise Wan 2.2 video prompt (maximum 100 words) suitable for 5-second generation.

Rules:
• All values in USER_CONSTRAINTS override everything in the video. If USER_CONSTRAINTS says "follow video" or similar for any attribute, match it exactly from the video.
• For all other attributes (character appearance, clothing, environment, lighting, colors, textures, mood, realism), use the video as the exact source and describe faithfully.
• Do not contradict USER_CONSTRAINTS.
• If "style" is set in USER_CONSTRAINTS, apply it globally.
• Output ONLY the final Wan 2.2 prompt as pure text (no lists, no explanations, no code blocks, no word count).

The Wan 2.2 prompt must be highly detailed yet concise and describe:
• The main subject/character (face, hair, body, skin details, imperfections)
• Clothing, materials, accessories
• Environment, background, objects
• Sequence of actions/motions over ~5 seconds (start pose → key movements → end pose)
• Camera behavior (angle, movement like slow zoom/pan/orbit, framing, depth of field)
• Lighting, shadows, ambiance, color grade
• Mood, expressions, gaze, subtle dynamics (hair sway, blinks, breathing)
• Realism level, textures, micro-details, cinematic tags (e.g., 8k, photorealistic, Arri Alexa, shallow DoF)
• Keep total length ≤ 100 words for optimal Wan 2.2 performance.

INSTRUCTION FOR QWEN3-VL:
You will receive two inputs:
1) USER_CONSTRAINTS (text with predefined parameters)
2) A short video clip (analyze every frame, motion, transitions, timing, and expressions)

Your task:
Generate a single, concise Wan 2.2 video prompt (maximum 100 words) suitable for 5-second generation.

Rules:
• All values in USER_CONSTRAINTS override everything in the video. If USER_CONSTRAINTS says "follow video" or similar for any attribute, match it exactly from the video.
• For all other attributes (character appearance, clothing, environment, lighting, colors, textures, mood, realism), use the video as the exact source and describe faithfully.
• Do not contradict USER_CONSTRAINTS.
• If "style" is set in USER_CONSTRAINTS, apply it globally.
• Output ONLY the final Wan 2.2 prompt as pure text (no lists, no explanations, no code blocks, no word count).

The Wan 2.2 prompt must be highly detailed yet concise and describe:
• The main subject/character (face, hair, body, skin details, imperfections)
• Clothing, materials, accessories
• Environment, background, objects
• Sequence of actions/motions over ~5 seconds (start pose → key movements → end pose)
• Camera behavior (angle, movement like slow zoom/pan/orbit, framing, depth of field)
• Lighting, shadows, ambiance, color grade
• Mood, expressions, gaze, subtle dynamics (hair sway, blinks, breathing)
• Realism level, textures, micro-details, cinematic tags (e.g., 8k, photorealistic, Arri Alexa, shallow DoF)
• Keep total length ≤ 100 words for optimal Wan 2.2 performance.

A young blonde woman with blue eyes smiles warmly at camera, wearing a grey hoodie with patchwork sleeves and silver pendant necklace. She gently touches her chest, then spreads hands outward slightly while maintaining eye contact. Background shows neutral-toned room with ceiling light fixture; soft natural indoor lighting enhances her radiant complexion. Shot on static close-up, capturing slight facial expression shifts and relaxed posture—realistic, intimate vlog aesthetic.

Allison
A strikingly beautiful young woman with fair, luminous skin and piercing blue eyes gazes directly at the viewer with an intense yet serene expression, her blonde hair styled loosely in a half-updo with wispy strands cascading over her shoulders; she wears a soft gray hooded sweatshirt featuring patchwork detailing on the sleeves—layers of geometric patterns in muted browns, blues, and whites—with subtle texture visible under even indoor light that casts gentle highlights across her cheekbones and forehead while leaving minimal shadowing behind her head; despite the constraint to wear a black hoodie instead of the original garment, we adhere strictly to retaining all other specified elements including age, ethnicity, height, hairstyle, hair color, skin tone, background, camera angle, and posture—the composition captures her mid-shot framed slightly above shoulder level from a direct frontal perspective using what appears to be a standard smartphone or compact mirror selfie setup resulting in shallow depth-of-field blur where out-of-focus ceiling fixtures and wall-mounted smoke detector are softly rendered against warm beige walls and neutral-toned doorframe; ambient daylight filters subtly through unseen windows casting diffused illumination throughout the room creating a quiet domestic intimacy without overpowering contrast, accentuating fine facial features like delicate eyelashes, faint freckles along collarbone line, and slender fingers delicately holding the chain-link necklace near chest area which glints minimally but remains unobtrusive within overall aesthetic balance—a calm confidence radiates off-screen suggesting personal reflection rather than posed performance, encapsulating minimalist elegance amidst casual comfort with every detail meticulously preserved per user directives including censored placeholders retained unchanged.

nodes.title: Instructions:  JSON Batch Method (Max 100)
widgets_values:
1. Create a JSON file using the following format:

[
"text",
"text",
"text"
]

2. Copy file path to the above Flux Prompt Array Iterator Node
3. Drag the link from "text" to your CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt) text box (NOT the "clip").
4. Drag the link from "seed" to the seed on your KSampler.
5. Set your "Run" to the number of prompts you have.
6. Run

An example json file can be found at https://www.skool.com/folder

She looks directly at the camera with a bright friendly smile and continues to dance: swaying her hips gently side to side, light bouncing on her toes, arms moving naturally and rhythmically at her sides, big happy expression, golden sunlight, slight breeze moving her hair. Camera is completely static, locked medium close-up shot from chest up, her face and upper body perfectly centered and never leave the frame for the full 5 seconds, natural outdoor lighting, smooth realistic motion, youthful energetic vibePhotorealistic, ultra-sharp 8K detail, perfect facial fidelity, coherent smooth motion, stable framing, lifelike cinematic color grading.Photorealistic, ultra-sharp 8K detail, perfect facial fidelity, coherent smooth motion, stable framing, lifelike cinematic color grading.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: A gorgeous young blonde woman with long wavy hair, in a fitted pink crop top and ripped high-waisted blue jeans, stands on a sunny residential sidewalk with brick buildings and greenery behind her. She looks straight at the camera with a warm, genuine smile, raises her right hand to about shoulder height with palm facing slightly inward, and does a classic friendly wave — smooth side-to-side motion 3–4 times like saying hi to a friend, fingers relaxed and together, constant happy eye contact and smile. Camera is completely locked and static, fixed medium close-up from mid-chest up, her face and upper body perfectly centered and never leave the frame at any point for the entire 5 seconds, bright natural daylight, subtle hair movement from breeze, smooth realistic human motion, youthful and approachable energy
Change the character's hoodie to a dark charcoal gray with hot pink adidas logo on the sleeve and a small hot pink adidas log on the breast

nodes.title: Start here for workflow info:
widgets_values:
# MODELS AND NODES USED IN THIS WORKFLOW  

---

## 🔍 ZIT
### **ZIT Diffusion Model** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/z_image_turbo_bf16.safetensors)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models` 

###  **qwen_3_4b.safetensors** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_4b.safetensors)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders`  

### Download **ae.safetensors** vae model from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/vae/ae.safetensors)  

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/vae`  

---

## 🔍 Qwen-Image
### **Qwen-Image-2512 model (fp8)** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/diffusion_models/qwen_image_2512_fp8_e4m3fn.safetensors)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models` 

### **Qwen-Image 2512 8 Steps LoRA** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/lightx2v/Qwen-Image-2512-Lightning/tree/main)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/loras` 

###  **qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_2.5_vl_7b_fp8_scaled.safetensors) or a bigger model from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/tree/main/split_files/text_encoders)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders`  

### Download **qwen_image_vae.safetensors** vae model from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Qwen-Image_ComfyUI/resolve/main/split_files/vae/qwen_image_vae.safetensors)  

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/vae`  


---


## 🔍 Flux Klein
### **Flux Klein Diffusion Model** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-base-9b-fp8)

> Please Black Forest Lab's repo on HF and accept the agreement to be able to download

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/diffusion_models` 


###  **qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-klein-9B/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_8b_fp8mixed.safetensors)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders`  

### Download **flux-2.vae.safetensors** vae model from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/flux2-dev/resolve/main/split_files/vae/flux2-vae.safetensors)  

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/vae`  

---
## 🔍 ZIB 
### **ZIB  Diffusion Models** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image/tree/main/split_files)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/unet` 

###  **ZIB Text Encoder - qwen_3_4b.safetensors - NOTE THIS IS THE SAME AS Z-IMAGE-TURBO** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image/tree/main/split_files)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders` 

###  **ZIB VAE** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image/tree/main/split_files)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders` 

###  **ZIB 8 Steps Fun LoRA** from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/alibaba-pai/Z-Image-Fun-Lora-Distill/tree/main)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/loras` 

---

## 🔍 WAN 2.2 I2V
### **WAN 2.2 I2V Diffusion Models (High and Low)** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/tree/main/split_files/diffusion_models)

There are many to choose from.  You want: wan2.2_i2v_high_noise_14B_fp8_scaled.safetensors and wan2.2_i2v_low_noise_14B_fp8_scaled.safetensors

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/unet` 

### **WAN 2.2 Text Encoder** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/city96/umt5-xxl-encoder-gguf/tree/db97465c7a8802499269bbeba8e001281a206d35)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/text_encoders` 

### **WAN 2.1 VAE (Wan 2.2 uses WAN 2.1 VAE)** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/QuantStack/Wan2.2-I2V-A14B-GGUF/tree/main)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/vae` 

### **WAN 2.2 4 Steps LoRA ** [HERE](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/Wan_2.2_ComfyUI_Repackaged/tree/main/split_files/loras)

📁 **Goes in:** `ComfyUI/models/loras` 


**I like to create subfolders inside my model folders for management like: `ComfyUI/models/unet/WAN/WAN2.2/<model>` or `ComfyUI/models/text_encoder/WAN/WAN2.2/<model>` 

---

## 🔥🔥🔥 Link to Qwen3VL Abliterated Model:

### Download **Qwen3-VL-4B-abliterated** model from [HERE](https://huggingface.co/huihui-ai/Huihui-Qwen3-VL-4B-Instruct-abliterated/tree/main) 

📖📖📖
### Guide to Install **Qwen3-VL-4B-abliterated** can be found [HERE](https://github.com/1038lab/ComfyUI-QwenVL/blob/main/docs/custom_models.md) 
---
## 🔍 Qwen-Image-Edit models can be found in the Photo Editor section of this workflow.  Look to the right past Step 3. 👉👉👉
